{{Quote|The Jedi Way is more than just a system of techniques for controlling, sensing, and altering the Force. It is a philosophy of existence in which the individual sees his true nature as a part of a larger whole. The Jedi seek to live in harmony with the universe, focusing on iscipline and awareness to reach his goal. Many are the temptations...to fall onto easier paths. This the Jedi strives to avoid at all costs, no matter how dear.|Trayos Toreggen in ''[[Becoming One with the Force]]''|<ref name="Tales of the Jedi Companion">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref>}}
'''Trayos Toreggen''' was an ancient [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who wrote the text ''[[Becoming One with the Force]]''. Within this tome he cautioned Jedi from seeking an easier path to power; recognizing the Jedi Path was a difficult one to walk, he knew the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to offer quicker, more dangerous avenues to power.

{{Char-stub}}
